top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to slump despite US claims of ‘good foundations’ for Iran deal; Tech-sell off hits Asia
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Markets have shrugged off the latest developments in US-Iran peace with the FTSE 100 poised to fall at open despite Trump’s Vice President JD Vance claiming talks with Iran had “laid a very good foundation for a successful final deal”. top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Tumble 9% From Record, Triggering Trading Halt
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concern that the rally has become overstretched.

top_signals.title: 188 Merchant Marine, Military Officers Graduate from USMMA
